name: Ubiquiti
description: Ubiquiti Inc. is an American technology company known for manufacturing high-performance, license-free networking and physical security products. Their ecosystem is highly regarded by both tech enthusiasts ("prosumers") and enterprises for offering high-end features—like centralized cloud management and advanced security—without the ongoing subscription fees typical of other enterprise brands
